

## Presentations

**2024**

- Agricultural and Applied Economics Association Annual Meeting (scheduled)
- Canadian Agricultural Economics Society (CAES/SCAE) Annual Meeting (scheduled)


**2023**

- Agricultural and Applied Economics Association Annual Meeting (Washington, DC)


**2022**

- Agricultural and Applied Economics Association Annual Meeting (Anaheim, CA)
- Food Group Seminar (University of Minnesota)


**2021**

- The 31st International Conference of Agricultural Economists (Virtual)


**2019**

- SCC-76 “Economics and Management of Risks in Agriculture and Natural Resources” Annual Meeting (Kansas City, MO)


**2017**

- The 9th CAER-IFPRI Annual International Conference (Beijing, China)
